evals.prompt: 这个项目根目录有 .y3maker，我想迁移成 Claude Code 能直接用的 .claude/skills 和项目级 MCP 配置。先帮我 dry-run 看看会改什么。
evals.expected_output: Skill should run inventory and apply --dry-run with --mcp-scope project if MCP exists or ask the user to choose scope; it should not modify .y3maker and should summarize planned .claude/.mcp.json outputs.

evals.prompt: 我之前已经把 .y3maker 同步到 .claude 了，现在 .y3maker 里有更新。请安全地重复同步，不要覆盖我手改过的 .claude 内容。
evals.expected_output: Skill should use manifest-based apply, report created/updated/adopted/blocked/orphaned, preserve blocked local edits, and run verify before claiming completion.

evals.prompt: 只把 .y3maker 的旧 MCP 配置迁移到 Claude Code，其他内容先不动；我想知道 project/user/skip 的区别。
evals.expected_output: Skill should explain Claude Code MCP scopes, require an explicit choice, and avoid writing MCP config without user selection. It should recommend project .mcp.json for shared project MCP and user ~/.claude.json for private config.
